items.desc_factual: 24 m² room with one king-size bed, Wi-Fi, a 50" Smart TV, and a full bathroom with shower. Includes a steamer, minibar, safe, coffee machine, and kettle. Complimentary bottled water provided at check-in.
items.desc_experiencial: Ideal if you're looking for a comfortable, quiet base to rest and move around Miraflores at an easy pace. Functional spaces, Wi-Fi, a 50" Smart TV, and thoughtful details that add comfort from the very first moment. Perfect for solo travelers or couples. Some rooms can be connected.

items.desc_experiencial: More views, more of the city. With two windows, one king-size bed, and bathrobes and slippers, this room elevates the experience with natural light and thoughtful details to enjoy Lima from above. Ending your day here will be all you'll want.

Complimentary bottled water provided at check-in. If traveling with someone, it can be connected to a Superior Double room.
items.desc_experiencial: Thoughtfully designed to offer maximum comfort and accessibility without compromising on style. Featuring a king-size bed, generous space, and all the essential amenities, this room ensures a practical and welcoming stay for guests who need greater ease of movement.

items.desc_experiencial: A space designed to give you an extra layer of comfort. With 32 m², a king-size bed, a bathtub, and bathrobes and slippers, this suite brings together rest and ease in a spacious setting—perfect for special stays or urban escapes.

items.desc_experiencial: A spacious, flexible setting designed for those who value comfort and freedom. Fully equipped for working, hosting, or simply unwinding while exploring Lima, it's an ideal choice for longer stays or trips that call for extra room and ease.

items.desc_factual: Front desk assistance for general information and support throughout your stay.
items.desc_experiencial: Having someone there to help guide you whenever you need it.
frases_sugeridas: Useful if it's your first time
They'll help you find your way

items.desc_factual: We welcome dogs for an additional fee of USD 35.00 + taxes per night (includes a water bowl, food dish, and a pet bed). The maximum allowed weight is 15 kg, and dogs must remain in the room, with restricted access to common areas. A deposit is required, subject to confirmation. A valid vaccination record must be presented.
items.desc_experiencial: At HUMANO, dogs are always welcome. We believe travel is better in good company, which is why we offer a dog-friendly stay with everything your four-legged companion needs to feel just as comfortable and at home as you do.
frases_sugeridas: A good option if you travel with a pet

items.desc_factual: In-room food and beverage service.
items.desc_experiencial: Enjoy a relaxed, private meal without leaving your room.
frases_sugeridas: Handy if you'd rather not go out

items.desc_factual: Private transfer to or from Jorge Chávez Airport is available for an additional cost from USD 35.00 (taxes included). Please inquire about rates for other destinations.
items.desc_experiencial: We offer transportation to wherever you need to go—whether it's the airport, a business meeting, or a social event. A comfortable and reliable way to move to and from the hotel with ease.
frases_sugeridas: Handy if you arrive late or in the early morning

items.desc_factual: Wi-Fi connection available throughout the hotel.
items.desc_experiencial: Stay connected, effortlessly.
frases_sugeridas: Works well for work and leisure

items.desc_factual: Laundry and ironing service available at an additional cost.
items.desc_experiencial: We adapt to your rhythm with both regular and express laundry. Whether you're in a rush or taking it slow, we'll take care of your clothes so you can keep enjoying Lima.

items.desc_factual: We offer 40 parking spaces (2.05 m clearance), distributed across two basement levels. Parking is exclusively for guests and accommodates vehicles up to van size (Sprinter vans not permitted). Valet parking is not available.
items.desc_experiencial: Enjoy the freedom to move at your own pace, with comfort and security.
frases_sugeridas: Useful if you arrive by car

items.desc_factual: Daily housekeeping service.
items.desc_experiencial: Regular service: we clean your room daily. If you'd like it done differently, let us know at the front desk.

items.desc_factual: The heart of the hotel, where reception and waiting areas come together.
items.desc_experiencial: A calm space to arrive, find your way, or wait at ease.
frases_sugeridas: A good place to settle in on arrival

items.desc_factual: Breakfast area, where the day begins.
items.desc_experiencial: Start the day at ease without leaving the hotel.
frases_sugeridas: Convenient if you'd rather stay in

items.desc_factual: Our 18th-floor restaurant, specializing in grilled dishes and wine.
items.desc_experiencial: Entrañable invites you to enjoy premium grilled meats, handcrafted drinks, great conversations, and the best views of Miraflores from the 18th floor. An open, warm, and character-filled space, perfect for relaxed lunches or open-air dinners while Lima lights up at sunset.

items.desc_factual: A restaurant on the first floor with traditional Peruvian and classic dishes.
items.desc_experiencial: We are Café de Lima franchise (a Peruvian restaurant), a welcoming and relaxed space where you can enjoy authentic local flavors. From early morning until late evening, it is the perfect place for breakfast, lunch, dinner, or simply a break during the day.

items.desc_factual: Our shared working area, designed for productivity and ease.
items.desc_experiencial: A space designed for creating, meeting, and focusing. Open 24 hours, HUMANO's coworking blends comfort, connectivity, and a relaxed atmosphere—ideal for working, informal meetings, or simply a change of scenery.

items.desc_factual: A well-equipped space for your daily training routine.
items.desc_experiencial: Our 24-hour gym offers cardio machines, weights, and everything you need to stay on track. A simple, comfortable space to train on your own time and at your own rhythm.

items.desc_factual: Our pool, designed for relaxation and enjoyment.
items.desc_experiencial: Located on the 17th floor, our pool is an urban oasis. Perfect for unwinding after a busy day or simply slowing down and enjoying the moment—without leaving the hotel.

items.desc_factual: Spaces designed for meetings and gatherings.
items.desc_experiencial: Spaces tailored for focused work encounters and meetings.

items.desc_factual: A bar space on the first-floor restaurant.
items.desc_experiencial: A relaxed spot to wrap up the day with a drink or meet up with friends for drinks.

items.desc_factual: A coastal path in Miraflores, ideal for a walk or a morning run.
items.desc_experiencial: A simple way to connect with the city and the ocean from early in the day.
frases_sugeridas: Perfect for a walk or a run

items.desc_factual: A central park in Miraflores, a lively meeting point surrounded by cafés and local life.
items.desc_experiencial: A good spot to feel the rhythm of Miraflores.

items.desc_factual: A shopping center facing the sea, with restaurants, stores, and ocean scenery.
items.desc_experiencial: An easy-going spot with great views and places to eat.
frases_sugeridas: Combines a stroll and a meal

items.desc_factual: A smooth, level path along the Malecón, widely used by runners.
items.desc_experiencial: Start your day with a run along the ocean.

items.desc_factual: Just a short distance from the hotel, a variety of cafés to choose from.
items.desc_experiencial: Enjoy a coffee at a slow pace, with the local rhythm.

items.desc_factual: A ceremonial archaeological site from the Lima culture, built between 450 and 650 AD.
items.desc_experiencial: Travel back in time and discover the essence of ancient Lima on a unique journey.

items.desc_factual: Experience Miraflores from above as you glide along the cliffs, with sweeping views of the ocean and skyline.
items.desc_experiencial: Feel the wind and see Lima from a whole new perspective—from above.

items.desc_factual: Theaters within walking distance, with a varied program of local and global shows.
items.desc_experiencial: Step into the magic of theater, where each performance brings a new world of emotions to life.

items.desc_factual: A bohemian area of Lima where historic architecture, urban art, and nightlife come together.
items.desc_experiencial: A stroll among art, music, and bars full of Lima's spirit.

items.desc_factual: A historic bridge in Barranco, surrounded by traditional streets and scenic viewpoints.
items.desc_experiencial: Cross over and let the neighborhood lead the way.

items.desc_factual: A private museum featuring one of Peru's most extensive pre-Columbian art collections.
items.desc_experiencial: Over 5,000 years of history, housed in an 18th-century mansion that offers an intimate look into Peru's ancient cultures.

items.desc_factual: A well-known Miraflores beach, famous for its waves and surf culture.
items.desc_experiencial: A surf lesson to feel Lima from the ocean.

items.desc_factual: An access route for both pedestrians and vehicles linking Miraflores with the Costa Verde beaches.
items.desc_experiencial: A 20-minute walk to the ocean that's always worth taking.

items.desc_factual: A nearby local market offering fresh ingredients and local food.
items.desc_experiencial: Discover ingredients and flavors like a local.

items.desc_factual: A bike route that follows the Miraflores cliffs, overlooking the Pacific Ocean.
items.desc_experiencial: A peaceful ride where the city meets the sea.

items.desc_factual: Lima is globally recognized for its award-winning food scene.
items.desc_experiencial: Dine in one of the world's culinary capitals.

items.desc_factual: A park by the ocean, known for its mosaics and romantic art pieces.
items.desc_experiencial: A spot to slow down and watch the horizon unfold.

items.desc_factual: Streets filled with murals, cafés, and traditional architecture.
items.desc_experiencial: Wander without a plan through one of Lima's most creative districts.

items.desc_factual: A craft market featuring Peruvian handicrafts, textiles, and locally made souvenirs.
items.desc_experiencial: A vibrant market where colors, aromas, and handcrafted goods come together, offering an authentic glimpse into everyday local life and culture.

items.desc_factual: A community of cats that calls Miraflores' central park home.
items.desc_experiencial: A curious scene that always surprises.

items.desc_factual: Spontaneous or guided yoga sessions on the Malecón.
items.desc_experiencial: Breathe in Lima at a slow pace.

items.desc_factual: A World Heritage destination with colonial architecture and historic plazas.
items.desc_experiencial: A stroll through Lima as it once was centuries ago.

items.desc_factual: A cathedral located in Lima's Plaza Mayor, with great historical significance.
items.desc_experiencial: A quiet space of architecture in the middle of the city.

items.desc_factual: A historic religious site known for its subterranean catacombs.
items.desc_experiencial: A historic underground network of tunnels beneath a colonial church in Lima, known for its eerie atmosphere and the remains of thousands from the city's early past.

items.desc_factual: The Lima Art Museum, showcasing Peruvian art across different eras.
items.desc_experiencial: Collections of art spanning pre-Columbian, colonial, and contemporary periods in a beautifully restored historic building.

items.desc_factual: An urban park with light shows, fountains, and evening entertainment.
items.desc_experiencial: An unexpected visual experience in Lima.

items.desc_factual: A historic 22-meter lighthouse overlooking the Pacific.
items.desc_experiencial: Watch the sunset and ocean in warm tones.

items.desc_factual: A historic area known for its restaurants and Chinese culture, especially chifa—Peruvian-Chinese fusion cuisine.
items.desc_experiencial: A one-of-a-kind fusion of Peruvian and Chinese cultures.

items.desc_factual: Two routes handpicked by our neighbors: one through Miraflores and one through Barranco. Each with morning and evening stops.
items.desc_experiencial: Short on time? Go for the Miraflores stroll. Have a longer day? Try Barranco.

items.desc_factual:
Morning Stroll:
1. Risso, coffee worth the stop: You can't miss The Grano Especial Curitiba.
2. Yunuik, art gallery: Feels like another world.
3. Manolos, vintage café: "Un churro with manjar blanco por favor". A classic.
4. El Virrey, bookstore: Ask for Ernesto.
5. Curich, smoothies: Lúcuma "cremolada" with milk. One of a kind.

Evening Stroll:
6. Fito Espinoza Gallery: Art and coffee.
7. Kennedy Park: Music in the air, curious cats, and local life.
8. The Singular Concept Store: Handcrafted pieces.
9. El Infusionista: Local potions.
10. Casa Rebara, tavern: Beer, butifarra sandwiches, and live music.
items.desc_experiencial: Ten stops to walk Miraflores like a local: cafés, galleries, bookstores, and bohemia.

items.desc_factual:
Morning Stroll:
1. Pan Sal Aire, café: French toast with berries.
2. Jade Rivera Museum, contemporary muralist: Start with the blue room.
3. Blu: The stracciatella and "maracumango" combo… worth the wait.
4. Bridge of Sighs: Hold your breath and make a wish as you cross by, it's worth the shot.
5. Cuatro en un Baúl: Don't miss Rafa Lanfranco's robots.

Evening Stroll:
6. Dédalo: Coffee and traditional Peruvian art.
7. Heraldos Negros Bookstore: "The right book always finds its reader".
8. Domeyer Street: Stop by Siete for a negroni.
9. Bajada de Baños: Keep it classic at Javier, go bold at Gato Tulipán, or take it up a notch at Menú.
10. Lady Bee: Cocktails, good music, and a bohemian vibe.
items.desc_experiencial: Ten stops to walk Barranco through art, coffee, bookstores, and bohemia.

reglas.descripcion_practica: Este Excel es la única fuente de información que consume la IA. No se corrige información desde prompts.
Usar siempre las mismas palabras clave en perfil_ideal, requisitos y restricciones. Separar valores con |.
Las descripciones deben ser cortas, claras y sin promesas comerciales.
Todo servicio con costo, coordinación o tercerización debe indicarse en condiciones_servicio.
Si algo cambia en la operación real del hotel, se actualiza aquí el mismo día.
